nasb.text: Their land has also been filled with idols; They worship the work of their hands, That which their fingers have made.

esv.text: Their land is filled with idols; they bow down to the work of their hands, to what their own fingers have made.

cnv.text: 他們的地滿了偶像； 他們敬拜自己雙手所做的， 就是他們的指頭所做的。

ccb.text: 他们境内偶像林立， 他们跪拜自己用手所造的物品， 跪拜自己用指头所造之物。

csbs.text: 他们的地充斥着偶像， 他们向自己手所造的， 向自己指头所做的下拜。
